name: ATAFOM University International
description: Atlantic African Oriental Multicultural University International known as ATAFOM University International, is a private University with headquarters in Bangui, Central African Republic (CAR). It has offices in Nigeria, Germany, India, America, England and other locations. The university uses the hybrid teaching model – online and physical classroom – for learning.

name: EUCLID
description: EUCLID, also called Pôle Universitaire Euclide or Euclid University, is an international intergovernmental organization with a university charter established in 2008. It has official headquarters in The Gambia and in the Central African Republic, but also maintains an executive office in Washington, D.C. Its primary mandate is to train officials for its participating states, but its programs are also offered to the general public. The institution's current secretary-general is Winston Dookeran.

name: University of Bangui
description: The University of Bangui (French: Université de Bangui) is a public university located in Bangui, Central African Republic.

name: École nationale d'administration et de magistrature
aliases: National School for Administration and Magistracy
